source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
affmap.AffiliateName as AffiliateName
,cast(GETDATE() as DATE) as ReportDate
,affmap.ContractType as ReportType
,srs.[SourceCode] as Source
,srs.[Descr] as SubSource
,lds.srs_id as SubSourceID
,affmap.Division as Division
,lds.id as LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,lds.[Productid] as Product
,prd.LongDescr as ProductDescription
,brn.LongName as Market
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDispositionID
,dsp.Comments as CurrentLeadDisposition
,lds.ApptSet as ApptSet
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,lds.[NetIssued] as [NetIssue]
,lds.Sat as Demo
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 'False'
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 'False'
    else 'True'
end as Sold
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 0
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end as NetSales
,job.id as JobID
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,job.ContractDate as [JobContractDate]
,lds.LogNumber as [AffiliateLeadNumber]
,'' as RenuityLeadScore
,COALESCE(utm.UTMSource, '') as UTM_SOURCE
FROM 
[RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING] affmap
inner join [ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds
on lds.srs_id = affmap.srs_id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_prd_Products] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join
(select lds_id, max(SetDate) as SetDate, max(ApptDate) as ApptDate from [ODS].[LP_FHI_app_Appointments] group by lds_id) app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_FHI_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_utm_UTMParameters] utm
on lds.id = utm.lds_id
WHERE
datediff(DAY, lds.EntryDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (cast(GETDATE() as DATE) )) between 0 and 90
and affmap.Division = 'FHI'

scripts.text: IF OBJECT_ID('OUT.AFFILIATES_DAILY_REPORT')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE OUT.AFFILIATES_DAILY_REPORT;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
affmap.AffiliateName as AffiliateName
,cast(GETDATE() as DATE) as ReportDate
,affmap.ContractType as ReportType
,srs.[SourceCode] as Source
,srs.[Descr] as SubSource
,lds.srs_id as SubSourceID
,affmap.Division as Division
,lds.id as LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,lds.[Productid] as Product
,prd.LongDescr as ProductDescription
,brn.LongName as Market
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDispositionID
,dsp.Comments as CurrentLeadDisposition
,lds.ApptSet as ApptSet
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,lds.[NetIssued] as [NetIssue]
,lds.Sat as Demo
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 'False'
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 'False'
    else 'True'
end as Sold
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 0
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end as NetSales
,job.id as JobID
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,job.ContractDate as [JobContractDate]
,lds.LogNumber as [AffiliateLeadNumber]
,'' as RenuityLeadScore
,COALESCE(utm.UTMSource, '') as UTM_SOURCE
FROM 
[RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING] affmap
inner join [ODS].[LP_SWR_Lds_Leads] lds
on lds.srs_id = affmap.srs_id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_prd_Products] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join
(select lds_id, max(SetDate) as SetDate, max(ApptDate) as ApptDate from [ODS].[LP_SWR_app_Appointments] group by lds_id) app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_SWR_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_utm_UTMParameters] utm
on lds.id = utm.lds_id
WHERE
datediff(DAY, lds.EntryDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (cast(GETDATE() as DATE) )) between 0 and 90
and affmap.Division = 'SWR'

SELECT distinct
affmap.AffiliateName as AffiliateName
,cast(GETDATE() as DATE) as ReportDate
,affmap.ContractType as ReportType
,srs.[SourceCode] as Source
,srs.[Descr] as SubSource
,lds.srs_id as SubSourceID
,affmap.Division as Division
,lds.id as LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,lds.[Productid] as Product
,prd.LongDescr as ProductDescription
,brn.LongName as Market
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDispositionID
,dsp.Comments as CurrentLeadDisposition
,lds.ApptSet as ApptSet
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,lds.[NetIssued] as [NetIssue]
,lds.Sat as Demo
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 'False'
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 'False'
    else 'True'
end as Sold
/*
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 0
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end as NetSales
*/
,job.JobNetAmt as NetSales
,job.id as JobID
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,job.ContractDate as [JobContractDate]
,lds.LogNumber as [AffiliateLeadNumber]
,'' as RenuityLeadScore
,COALESCE(utm.UTMSource, '') as UTM_SOURCE

on lds.srs_id = srs.id

on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_prd_Products] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join
(select lds_id, max(SetDate) as SetDate, max(ApptDate) as ApptDate from [ODS].[LP_PBC_app_Appointments] group by lds_id) app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_PBC_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_PBC_utm_UTMParameters] utm
on lds.id = utm.lds_id

and affmap.Division = 'PBC'

FROM 
[RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING] affmap
inner join [ODS].[LP_CTA_Lds_Leads] lds
on lds.srs_id = affmap.srs_id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_prd_Products] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join
(select lds_id, max(SetDate) as SetDate, max(ApptDate) as ApptDate from [ODS].[LP_CTA_app_Appointments] group by lds_id) app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_CTA_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_utm_UTMParameters] utm
on lds.id = utm.lds_id
WHERE
datediff(DAY, lds.EntryDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (cast(GETDATE() as DATE) )) between 0 and 90
and 
affmap.Division = 'CTA'
